message:
✨ Unify Contribute modal: merge Queue + Activity, simplify Submit form (#1228)

- Rename modal header from "Feedback" to "Contribute"
- Remove sub-tabs entirely — single scrollable Updates view with
  section headers (Your Requests, GitHub Contributions)
- Remove Notifications section (redundant with request status)
- Remove separate Title input — first line of description auto-extracts
- Expand textarea to fill dialog with rich example prompts
- Show username in GitHub Contributions header with "coins" label
- Enable closeOnBackdrop so clicking outside closes the dialog
- Remove initialSubTab prop and unused notification helpers
- Clean up unused imports (AlertTriangle, NotificationType, Notification)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Akash Anand <allinonegaming3456@gmail.com>
